scripts.build: pnpm --filter @teijitaisha/shared build && pnpm --filter @teijitaisha/server build && pnpm --filter @teijitaisha/web build
scripts.deploy:web:staging: pnpm build:web && wrangler pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name=teijitaisha-web-staging --branch=develop
scripts.deploy:web:production: pnpm build:web && wrangler pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name=teijitaisha-web --branch=main
